muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
muxt check

exec go test -race -count=1

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /echo Echo(lastEventID)" -}}id={{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
{{- define "GET /num Num(lastEventID)" -}}n={{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

// Echo returns the Last-Event-Id header verbatim (default string type).
func (Server) Echo(lastEventID string) string { return lastEventID }

// Num parses the Last-Event-Id header to an int based on the method signature.
func (Server) Num(lastEventID int) int { return lastEventID }
-- server_test.go --
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"testing"
)

func TestEcho(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, Server{})

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/echo", nil)
	req.Header.Set("Last-Event-Id", "abc123")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
	}
	if got := rec.Body.String(); got != "id=abc123" {
		t.Fatalf("body = %q, want %q", got, "id=abc123")
	}
}

func TestNum(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, Server{})

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/num", nil)
	req.Header.Set("Last-Event-Id", "42")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
	}
	if got := rec.Body.String(); got != "n=42" {
		t.Fatalf("body = %q, want %q", got, "n=42")
	}
}

func TestNum_badHeader(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, Server{})

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/num", nil)
	req.Header.Set("Last-Event-Id", "not-an-int")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusBadRequest {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusBadRequest)
	}
}
